title: Meowsynth pack
description: Replaces the Minecraft ost with meowsynth covers!
body:
## **Description**

The Meowsynth pack is a W.I.P resource pack that replaces the music of the in-game ost to meowsynth covers of the ost (covers made by @theaou)

(It also replaces the "harp" and "flute" noise in noteblocks)

## Progress
**Completed:**

There is quite a few things before fully completing this resource pack, here are the things that i have already done
- Volume Alpha
- Replacing Noteblock sounds
- Main Menu

**To Do:**
- Volume Beta
- Music Discs
- Post 1.13 OST
